lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just spoke to Nung, he said it was ok.

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Well...if Nung say it ok, den go ahead.

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Silly fishy! You lookin' like likkle Mogre wid your likkle arms an' wid your likkle legs!

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Swim along silly round head fishy!

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Dont let dem big skippies eat you!
